task.title: Revise main CodeWiki bootstrap skill
task.summary: Update the main `codewiki` skill so it owns bootstrap, status, onboarding, and loop routing without embedding compiler-specific workflow detail.

goal.outcome: Main `codewiki` skill is a lean package-safe entry point for bootstrap/status/router behavior, including sprint-aware routing for related executable work.
acceptance: `skills/codewiki/SKILL.md` describes when to use the main skill for bootstrap, status, onboarding, and selecting the next compiler/gateway mode.
Bootstrap/onboarding guidance is reachable through package-local skill references and does not rely on unpublished `.codewiki/**` links.
Main skill lists available commands/tools accurately enough for first contact, then routes detailed loop work to focused loop skills.
Main skill/router guidance states when related executable work should be tracked through sprint metadata and routes that decision to planning/tool-contract support.
non_goals: Do not author detailed compiler/gateway loop instructions in the main skill.
Do not change runtime bootstrap command behavior unless needed to keep prompt assets loading.
Do not hand-edit roadmap sprint metadata directly from the skill guidance.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Superseded TASK-098 implementation build with accepted planning-build traceability while preserving main CodeWiki bootstrap/status/router skill evidence.
checks_run: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck

evidence: Prompt asset smoke covers package-local routing and forbidden `.codewiki` package refs.
Package smoke and TASK-076 restructure tests cover skill surface consistency.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Rewrote main `codewiki` skill as package-safe bootstrap/status/router entrypoint.
Updated bootstrap onboarding/starter taxonomy, README, and tests with sprint-aware routing.
notes: Metadata remediation only: source content unchanged from original TASK-098 implementation; added accepted planning-build traceability for validation policy.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Prompt asset smoke covers package-local routing and forbidden `.codewiki` package refs.
Package smoke and TASK-076 restructure tests cover skill surface consistency.
code_change_evidence: Rewrote main `codewiki` skill as package-safe bootstrap/status/router entrypoint.
Updated bootstrap onboarding/starter taxonomy, README, and tests with sprint-aware routing.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: `skills/codewiki/SKILL.md` describes when to use the main skill for bootstrap, status, onboarding, and selecting the next compiler/gateway mode.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Rewrote `skills/codewiki/SKILL.md` as the main entry skill with use cases, first-read/bootstrap, package surface, invariants, compiler routing, and coordination/memory sections.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Bootstrap/onboarding guidance is reachable through package-local skill references and does not rely on unpublished `.codewiki/**` links.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Main skill now points to package-local bootstrap, loop skills/docs, and playbooks; tests forbid package-relative `.codewiki` links.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Main skill lists available commands/tools accurately enough for first contact, then routes detailed loop work to focused loop skills.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Main skill lists public commands and internal `codewiki_*` tools, then routes feedback/documentation/planning/implementation/validation to focused skills.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Main skill/router guidance states when related executable work should be tracked through sprint metadata and routes that decision to planning/tool-contract support.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added task/sprint routing section defining sprint-shaped work, forbidding manual sprint metadata edits, and routing safe mutation support to planning/application tool contracts; onboarding/taxonomy include sprint metadata guidance.

closure_brief.user_intent: Revise the main CodeWiki skill as a lean bootstrap/status/router entrypoint with package-safe references and sprint-aware routing criteria.
implemented_changes: Rewrote main `codewiki` skill as package-safe bootstrap/status/router entrypoint.
Removed reliance on package-relative `.codewiki` related-doc links.
Added sprint-aware routing criteria and no-manual-sprint-edit guidance.
Updated bootstrap onboarding and starter taxonomy with sprint metadata guidance.
Updated README and prompt asset smoke coverage.
Superseded the original implementation build with accepted planning-build traceability.
acceptance_evidence: Main skill now describes bootstrap/status/router use and routes loop details to focused skills.
Package-local references replace unpublished `.codewiki` package refs.
Accepted planning build is cited by this implementation build.
checks: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck
remaining_risks: Clean immutable proof needed before task-close/publication.

risks: Task-close/publication still requires clean immutable proof.

Remote publication requires explicit approval; task-close still needs clean immutable proof.
